task_completion.description: Create or open a tax return for Elias Thorne in StudioTax 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax 2024 interface is visible with the taxpayer name 'Elias Thorne' entered in the personal information or identification section.

task_completion.description: Enter adaptive technology and/or guide dog expenses into Form T929 (Disability Supports Deduction).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Form T929 is open in the StudioTax interface, showing numerical entries corresponding to portions of the $6,500 adaptive technology or $3,700 guide dog expenses.

task_completion.description: Enter the remaining adaptive technology and/or guide dog expenses into Medical Expenses (Line 33099).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Medical Expenses worksheet or Line 33099 is visible in StudioTax, showing entries for the balance of the adaptive technology or guide dog expenses not claimed on Form T929.

task_completion.description: Claim the $10,000 Home Buyers' Amount (Line 31270) using the DTC exception.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Line 31270 (Home buyers' amount) shows a claim of $10,000, and the specific checkbox or field indicating the Disability Tax Credit (DTC) exception (or accessible home exception for non-first-time buyers) is selected.

task_completion.description: Save the completed tax return as 'elias_thorne.24t' in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box or the StudioTax window title bar shows the file being saved as 'elias_thorne.24t' in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\' directory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual StudioTax 2024 graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse clicks, form navigation, and typing within the StudioTax 2024 application window, rather than using terminal commands to manipulate files.

integrity.description: The agent opened and reviewed the provided tax documents and taxpayer memo.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent opening files (like taxpayer_memo.txt or PDFs) located in 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\thorne\' to extract the necessary financial values.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts to generate the output file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent writing Python, PowerShell, or other scripts to bypass the StudioTax software and directly create the '.24t' file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Taxpayer Name: Elias Thorne. Province: NS. Occupation: Software engineer. The agent must optimize $6,500 for adaptive technology and $3,700 for a guide dog between Form T929 (Disability Supports Deduction) and Medical Expenses (Line 33099). The agent must also claim the $10,000 Home Buyers' Amount (Line 31270) using the DTC exception (not a first-time buyer). The final file must be saved as 'elias_thorne.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.
